security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' https://*.githubusercontent.com https://avatars.githubusercontent.com data: asset: https://asset.localhost; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' https://api.github.com https://*.githubusercontent.com https://github.com

bundle.longDescription: Decentralized GitHub-native application store. Discover, install, and update open-source apps directly from GitHub Releases.
